Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: Results state the two variants had combined effects greater than single variants and Discussion links these findings to beneficial information for high-quality maize breeding and QPM improvement, though 'marker-assisted selection' is an inference rather than explicit wording.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.reason: The duplication significantly influenced Lys/Total and expression of four candidate genes including GRMZM2G138727, and GRMZM2G138727 haplotypes were significantly associated with Lys/Total.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: All listed methods appear in Results: GWAS signal within QTL interval, HIF/progeny test, eQTLs for local genes, expression-phenotype correlation, duplication genotyping with primer 0707, and haplotype analysis.

Other_Important_Info.reason: All listed points are in Results: qγ27/o2 modifier1 colocalization, 15.26-kb duplication with four genes, effect on Lys/Total and expression, BB parents lacking duplication, low LD with haplotypes, and larger combined effects.
